message:
fix(ft-kernel-cpu): replace partial_cmp().unwrap() with total_cmp() in sorting (frankentorch-jin)

Eigenvalue sorting in eigh_contiguous_f64 and singular value sorting in
svd_tall both used partial_cmp().unwrap(), which panics when the input
contains NaN. Replaced with f64::total_cmp() which is NaN-safe and defines
a total order over all f64 values, preventing panics on degenerate inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
